dashboard.label: Asset Discovery
dashboard.description: Discover where your monitored endpoints appear in other Splunk indexes

search.query: | inputlookup ping_monitor_settings_lookup | search _key="global" | head 1 | eval found="yes" | append [| makeresults | eval index="ping", sourcetype="ping_monitor", metrics_index="ping_metrics", found="no"] | head 1 | eval index=if(found=="yes", index, "ping") | eval sourcetype=if(found=="yes", sourcetype, "ping_monitor") | eval metrics_index=if(found=="yes", metrics_index, "ping_metrics") | fields index, sourcetype, metrics_index, found

| eventcount summarize=false index=* | stats sum(count) as event_count by index | where event_count > 0 | sort -event_count | eval display=index." (".tostring(event_count, "commas")." events)" | fields index, display
index="$discovery_index$" | stats count by sourcetype | sort -count | eval display=sourcetype." (".tostring(count, "commas")." events)" | fields sourcetype, display

div.p: Find where your monitored endpoints appear in other Splunk data sources

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(hostname) as count
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(target_ip) as count
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(group) as count
| eventcount summarize=false index=* | stats dc(index) as count

div.h3: Select an Index to Begin Discovery
div.p: Choose an index from the dropdown above to search for events matching your monitored endpoints.

div.style: margin-top: 20px; text-align: left; max-width: 600px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;

div.span: Select a Splunk index (e.g., firewall, network, main)
Optionally filter by sourcetype within that index
Choose to match by IP address, hostname, or both
Click Submit to run the discovery search

panel.title: 🗂️ Quick Scan: Indexes That May Contain Your Assets

div.p: 💡 Tip: This quick scan samples your monitored IPs across all indexes. Select an index above for detailed discovery.

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats values(target_ip) as ips | eval sample_ips=mvindex(ips, 0, 4) | mvexpand sample_ips | map maxsearches=5 search="search earliest=-24h (src_ip=\"$sample_ips$\" OR dest_ip=\"$sample_ips$\" OR src=\"$sample_ips$\" OR dest=\"$sample_ips$\") | stats count by index | eval matched_ip=\"$sample_ips$\"" | stats sum(count) as event_count, values(matched_ip) as matched_ips by index | sort -event_count | head 15 | eval matched_ips=mvjoin(matched_ips, ", ") | rename index as "Index", event_count as "Events", matched_ips as "Sample Matched IPs"

div.span: Matching: $match_type$ fields against your monitored endpoints

search.query: | inputlookup ping_monitor_status_lookup | stats values(target_ip) as ips, values(hostname) as hosts | eval ip_terms="\"".mvjoin(ips, "\" OR \"")."\"" | eval host_terms="\"".mvjoin(hosts, "\" OR \"")."\"" | map maxsearches=1 search="search index=\"$discovery_index$\" sourcetype=\"$discovery_sourcetype$\" earliest=\"$discovery_time.earliest$\" latest=\"$discovery_time.latest$\" [| makeresults | eval search=case( \"$match_type$\"==\"ip\", \"(src_ip IN (\"+\"$ip_terms$\"+\") OR dest_ip IN (\"+\"$ip_terms$\"+\") OR src IN (\"+\"$ip_terms$\"+\") OR dest IN (\"+\"$ip_terms$\"+\") OR dvc_ip IN (\"+\"$ip_terms$\"+\"))\", \"$match_type$\"==\"hostname\", \"(host IN (\"+\"$host_terms$\"+\") OR src_host IN (\"+\"$host_terms$\"+\") OR dest_host IN (\"+\"$host_terms$\"+\") OR computer IN (\"+\"$host_terms$\"+\"))\", true(), \"(src_ip IN (\"+\"$ip_terms$\"+\") OR dest_ip IN (\"+\"$ip_terms$\"+\") OR host IN (\"+\"$host_terms$\"+\"))\" ) | return $$search] | stats count"

| inputlookup ping_monitor_status_lookup | stats values(target_ip) as ips | eval ip_terms="\"".mvjoin(ips, "\" OR \"")."\"" | map maxsearches=1 search="search index=\"$discovery_index$\" sourcetype=\"$discovery_sourcetype$\" earliest=\"$discovery_time.earliest$\" latest=\"$discovery_time.latest$\" (src_ip IN ($ip_terms$) OR src IN ($ip_terms$)) | stats dc(coalesce(src_ip,src)) as count"

| inputlookup ping_monitor_status_lookup | stats values(target_ip) as ips | eval ip_terms="\"".mvjoin(ips, "\" OR \"")."\"" | map maxsearches=1 search="search index=\"$discovery_index$\" sourcetype=\"$discovery_sourcetype$\" earliest=\"$discovery_time.earliest$\" latest=\"$discovery_time.latest$\" (dest_ip IN ($ip_terms$) OR dest IN ($ip_terms$)) | stats dc(coalesce(dest_ip,dest)) as count"

| inputlookup ping_monitor_status_lookup | table target_ip, hostname, group | map maxsearches=500 search="search index=\"$discovery_index$\" sourcetype=\"$discovery_sourcetype$\" earliest=\"$discovery_time.earliest$\" latest=\"$discovery_time.latest$\" (src_ip=\"$target_ip$\" OR dest_ip=\"$target_ip$\" OR src=\"$target_ip$\" OR dest=\"$target_ip$\" OR host=\"$hostname$\" OR src_host=\"$hostname$\" OR dest_host=\"$hostname$\") | head 1 | stats count | eval target_ip=\"$target_ip$\", hostname=\"$hostname$\", group=\"$group$\", found=if(count>0,\"Yes\",\"No\")" | search found="Yes" | join type=left target_ip [ | inputlookup ping_monitor_status_lookup | table target_ip, hostname, group | map maxsearches=500 search="search index=\"$discovery_index$\" sourcetype=\"$discovery_sourcetype$\" earliest=\"$discovery_time.earliest$\" latest=\"$discovery_time.latest$\" (src_ip=\"$target_ip$\" OR dest_ip=\"$target_ip$\" OR src=\"$target_ip$\" OR dest=\"$target_ip$\") | stats count as event_count, dc(sourcetype) as sourcetype_count, values(sourcetype) as sourcetypes | eval target_ip=\"$target_ip$\"" ] | table target_ip, hostname, group, event_count, sourcetype_count, sourcetypes | sort -event_count | rename target_ip as "IP Address", hostname as "Hostname", group as "Group", event_count as "Events", sourcetype_count as "Sourcetypes", sourcetypes as "Found In"

| inputlookup ping_monitor_status_lookup | stats values(target_ip) as ips | eval ip_terms="\"".mvjoin(ips, "\" OR \"")."\"" | map maxsearches=1 search="search index=\"$discovery_index$\" sourcetype=\"$discovery_sourcetype$\" earliest=\"$discovery_time.earliest$\" latest=\"$discovery_time.latest$\" (src_ip IN ($ip_terms$) OR dest_ip IN ($ip_terms$) OR src IN ($ip_terms$) OR dest IN ($ip_terms$)) | eval match_type=case(isnotnull(src_ip), \"src_ip\", isnotnull(dest_ip), \"dest_ip\", isnotnull(src), \"src\", isnotnull(dest), \"dest\", true(), \"other\") | stats count by match_type | sort -count"

| inputlookup ping_monitor_status_lookup | stats values(target_ip) as ips | eval ip_terms="\"".mvjoin(ips, "\" OR \"")."\"" | map maxsearches=1 search="search index=\"$discovery_index$\" sourcetype=\"$discovery_sourcetype$\" earliest=\"$discovery_time.earliest$\" latest=\"$discovery_time.latest$\" (src_ip IN ($ip_terms$) OR dest_ip IN ($ip_terms$) OR src IN ($ip_terms$) OR dest IN ($ip_terms$)) | stats count by sourcetype | sort -count | head 10"

| inputlookup ping_monitor_status_lookup | stats values(target_ip) as ips | eval ip_terms="\"".mvjoin(ips, "\" OR \"")."\"" | map maxsearches=1 search="search index=\"$discovery_index$\" sourcetype=\"$discovery_sourcetype$\" earliest=\"$discovery_time.earliest$\" latest=\"$discovery_time.latest$\" (src_ip IN ($ip_terms$) OR dest_ip IN ($ip_terms$) OR src IN ($ip_terms$) OR dest IN ($ip_terms$)) | timechart span=auto count"

| inputlookup ping_monitor_status_lookup | stats values(target_ip) as ips | eval ip_terms="\"".mvjoin(ips, "\" OR \"")."\"" | map maxsearches=1 search="search index=\"$discovery_index$\" sourcetype=\"$discovery_sourcetype$\" earliest=\"$discovery_time.earliest$\" latest=\"$discovery_time.latest$\" (src_ip IN ($ip_terms$) OR dest_ip IN ($ip_terms$) OR src IN ($ip_terms$) OR dest IN ($ip_terms$)) | head 50 | table _time, sourcetype, src_ip, dest_ip, src, dest, src_port, dest_port, action, status, user, app, bytes, duration"

| inputlookup ping_monitor_status_lookup | stats values(target_ip) as ips | eval ip_terms="\"".mvjoin(ips, "\" OR \"")."\"" | map maxsearches=1 search="search index=\"$discovery_index$\" sourcetype=\"$discovery_sourcetype$\" earliest=\"$discovery_time.earliest$\" latest=\"$discovery_time.latest$\" (src_ip IN ($ip_terms$) OR dest_ip IN ($ip_terms$) OR src IN ($ip_terms$) OR dest IN ($ip_terms$)) | head 25"
